name: meetings
description: Hub-centric meeting notes: one Meetings Hub per day at spice/meetings/hubs/YYYY/MM-MMMM/ aggregating individual meeting notes at spice/meetings/notes/ via inline NewMeetingButton + MeetingsHubCards CustomJS classes. v0.1.2: filename pattern <Name>-YYYY-MM-DD (Meetings-YYYY-MM-DD.md hub; <title>-YYYY-MM-DD.md per-meeting); hub folder date-routed; class regex date-extract. v0.2.0: MeetingsHubCards migrated to BeaconCards via row layout + async pre-fetch adapter; per-badge SVG icons + secondaryText subtitle preserved end-to-end. v0.3.0 MINOR: pilot integration with people-rendering@0.1.0 mechanism — MeetingsHubCards subtitle slot renders attendee chips for registered People (those with spice/people/<name>.md notes) via PeopleRendering.renderChip callback (uses cards@0.2.4 subtitle-callback polymorphism); falls back to comma-string when no registered People; new ## Attendees chip-rendering dataviewjs block in Meeting.md template above the bullet list. NewMeetingButton attendee autocomplete deferred to v0.27.x carry.

post_install.message: Meetings blueprint installed at spice/meetings/. REQUIRED: enable the Templater community plugin if not already enabled. Click 'Meetings' to open today's meetings hub at spice/meetings/hubs/YYYY-MM-DD-Meetings.md. From the hub, click 'New Meeting' to create individual meeting notes at spice/meetings/notes/YYYY/MM-MMMM/YYYY-MM-DD <title>.md (you'll be prompted for title and attendees). Hub renders today's meetings as cards with status badges; meetings also appear in the daily dashboard's Today's Meetings panel.
